# BYCI - Build Your Career Institute

BYCI (Build Your Career Institute) is a professional development and training institute serving Kuwait, GCC countries, and India.

## Core Topics

- Professional development programs
- Corporate training
- Professional certifications
- AI and emerging technologies
- Data science
- Cloud computing
- Cybersecurity
- Leadership and business training

## Important URLs

- Home: https://byciedu.com/
- Programs: https://byciedu.com/programs
- Certifications: https://byciedu.com/certifications
- Corporate Training: https://byciedu.com/corporate
- Blog: https://byciedu.com/blog
- Contact: https://byciedu.com/contact
- Free AI Webinar: https://byciedu.com/free-ai-webinar
- AI Course in Kuwait: https://byciedu.com/training/ai-course-kuwait
- PMP Training in Kuwait: https://byciedu.com/training/pmp-training-kuwait
- Corporate Training in Kuwait: https://byciedu.com/training/corporate-training-kuwait
- Data Science Course in Kuwait: https://byciedu.com/training/data-science-course-kuwait
- Cybersecurity Course in Kuwait: https://byciedu.com/training/cybersecurity-course-kuwait
- Cloud Computing Course in Kuwait: https://byciedu.com/training/cloud-computing-course-kuwait

## Free AI Webinar

BYCI offers a free AI webinar for modern professionals, students, job seekers, and business owners.

- Schedule: Every Friday and Saturday
- Time: 7:00 PM
- Duration: 1 hour
- Mode: Online live webinar
- Language: English with Arabic support
- Registration: Free, completed through WhatsApp
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/96541103254

## Contact

- Email: info@byciedu.com
- Phone: +965 41103254
- Location: Kuwait City, Kuwait
